UploadPersonImageDialog.heading: Upload image
UploadPersonImageDialog.text: Upload the profile image. Allowed file types: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Maximum file size is 200 KB. Minimum image size is 300x300 pixels.

UpdatePersonImageDialog.heading: Change image
UpdatePersonImageDialog.error: An error occurred while uploading the image

error.fileSize: The file is too large. Maximum size is 200 KB.
error.imageSize: The image is too small. Minimum size is 300x300 pixels.
error.aspectRatio: The image should not be too wide or too tall.

GuestModeModal.heading: Guest Mode
GuestModeModal.text: Action is restricted in guest mode. An account is required to access all features. Please sign in or create a new account to remove guest mode restrictions.
